title: Fix Google Maps embed position/coordinates in LocationSection

requirements.summary: Fix the Google Maps iframe in LocationSection.tsx to correctly display the map centered on Dwarka Bartan Store at Akhnoor Palace, Jammu, using a proper embed URL that shows the accurate physical location
acceptanceCriteria: The embedded Google Maps iframe in LocationSection.tsx visually shows a map pin at or near Akhnoor Palace, Jammu — not a different or default location.
The iframe uses a valid Google Maps embed URL (using /maps/embed? format) that loads correctly without errors.
The map section is visible and properly positioned within the Location section layout.

file_operations.description: Update the Google Maps iframe src attribute to use a proper Google Maps embed URL that accurately centers on Dwarka Bartan Store's location at Akhnoor Palace, Jammu. Replace the current iframe src with a valid /maps/embed URL format (e.g., https://www.google.com/maps/embed?pb=... or https://www.google.com/maps/embed/v1/place?key=...&q=...) that corresponds to the correct geographic coordinates or place ID for the store. Ensure the 'Get Directions' button continues to link to https://maps.app.goo.gl/oxEd9nPJ4Ty4pYQL7. Verify visually that the map renders at the correct physical position showing Akhnoor Palace, Jammu area.
